case_title: LILIBETH BONIFACIO VS. ZENITH TUTORING, LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY BONIFACIO, LILIBETH AS TO DEFENDANT ZENITH TUTORING, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BONIFACIO, LILIBETH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ZENITH TUTORING, LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REPRESENTED BYROBIN WHITMORE, DIRECTOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
